title: crepis integra
intro: Crepis integra, also known as Sea Dandelion or Hawksbeard, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepis integra include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Crepis integra can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
